chapter_title.en: The transient nature of this world and importance of the next world

text: امَّا بَعْدُ، فَإِنَّ الدُّنْيَا قَدْ أَدْبَرَتْ، وَآذَنَتْ بِوَدَاعٍ، وَإِنَّ الاْخِرَةَ قَدْ أَقْبَلَتْ، وَأَشْرَفَتْ بِاطِّلاَعٍ

en.sayed-ali-raza: So now, surely this world has turned its back and announced its departure while the next world has appeared forward and proclaimed its approach.
